NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS MOHAMED KHATIB AND MOUNIA KHATIB'S Motion To Enforce Settlement IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 6, 2010 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 =301/PHA

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
JOHN P. BABA, Esq. of Wiegel & Fried LLP on behalf of plaintiff Steven Kovacs, individually and as Trustee to the Steven Kovacs Living Trust
JAMES K. O'GALLAGHER, Esq. and RICHARD L. BECKMAN, Esq. of Beckman Marquez LLP on behalf of defendants Mohamed Khatib and Mounia Khatib

The parties settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendants to pay plaintiff back rent in the amount of $3,850.00. Additional $200.00 to be paid by defendants commencing 3/1/06 until the remainder of the lease. Defendants to pay $12,000.00 in attorneys fees. Defendants have up to Augusut 31, 2006 to obtain medical cannibus dispenser permit and ATM permit. If unable to obtain permit by that time, defendants to pay additional $1,000.00 which will be pro-rated until permits are obtained. Any disputes will be handled in good faith to try and resolve. Dismissal of the case by August 31, 2007. All parties agreed to the terms of the settlement on the record.

Hon. Seymour Seidscher, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: V.Mu; Reporter: Ron Sinclair, CSR #1170 (206)
